policies.refund: No refunds are issued after 7 days of purchase.
policies.support: 24/7 live support is available exclusively on the Pro plan. Basic plan users have access to email support only.
policies.trial: We offer a 7-day free trial on all plans. No credit card required.
policies.cancellation: You can cancel your subscription at any time. Access continues until end of billing period.

company.name: AutoStream
company.tagline: Automated video editing tools for content creators.
company.description: AutoStream is a SaaS platform that uses AI to automate video editing, helping content creators on YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and other platforms save time and produce professional content.
